entity.name: MITRE Corporation
entity.description: Federally Funded Research and Development Corporation that runs much of the day-to-day AI standards / red-teaming / evaluation work for NIST AISI, DoD CDAO, and the Intelligence Community. ATLAS adversarial-AI knowledge base, AISI evaluation contracts, and DoD AI test-and-evaluation playbooks all originate here. Quasi-governmental in practice.
